title: lepisorus macrosphaerus
intro: Lepisorus macrosphaerus, also known as the large-scaled cliff fern, is a type of fern native to Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus macrosphaerus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or dried forms to harness its medicinal properties.
